title: Build a Production-Grade Pokedex in TypeScript
description: TypeScript learners ready to integrate strict runtime boundaries, a Node command lifecycle, Fetch, async state, fair-use caching, cancellation, persistence, security, testing, packaging, and operations into one cumulative learning product. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate a cumulative accessible typescript and node pokedex command product using documented pokéapi pagination, pokemon, and location-area contracts through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate unknown json validation, strict view models, fetch and abortsignal ownership, immutable async state, fair-use caching, promise deduplication, persistence, and recovery through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate original deterministic browser models plus controlled typescript 7, node 24, emitted-runtime, readline, network, filesystem, package, handle, load, and release transfer gates through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate five distinct stakeholder projects and a cumulative performance defense through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

competencies.statement: Define learner population, science or coding decision, command journey, accepted failure, feedback, and observable learning value.
misconceptions: A themed API lookup automatically creates a useful learning experience.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define learner population, science or coding decision, command journey, accepted failure, feedback, and observable learning value.

competencies.statement: Specify commands, arguments, examples, aliases, case and whitespace policy, invalid forms, and stable results as a small language.
misconceptions: Natural-language-like command parsing needs no explicit grammar.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Specify commands, arguments, examples, aliases, case and whitespace policy, invalid forms, and stable results as a small language.

competencies.statement: Model ready, prompting, parsing, dispatching, waiting, reporting, aborted, closing, and closed states with legal transitions.
misconceptions: An async while loop prevents invalid session states.

competencies.statement: Make help, progress, errors, and results usable by keyboard, screen readers, high zoom, narrow terminals, and users who cannot rely on color or motion.

competencies.statement: Test abort before and during question, fetch, cache wait, prefetch, and save plus repeated signal, cleanup order, state, and output.
misconceptions: A manual Ctrl-C run proves all async resources terminate.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test abort before and during question, fetch, cache wait, prefetch, and save plus repeated signal, cleanup order, state, and output.

competencies.statement: Justify prefetch from learner latency and API fair-use evidence and identify views where it must remain disabled.
misconceptions: Background network work has no user or service cost.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Justify prefetch from learner latency and API fair-use evidence and identify views where it must remain disabled.

competencies.statement: Set active, queued, byte, request, time, and retry budgets independent of result count.
misconceptions: Promise.all is an acceptable concurrency limiter for finite arrays.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set active, queued, byte, request, time, and retry budgets independent of result count.

competencies.statement: Track queued, active, settled, canceled, and published tasks with exactly one owner for scheduling and cleanup.
misconceptions: A Promise owns and cancels the underlying operation by itself.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Track queued, active, settled, canceled, and published tasks with exactly one owner for scheduling and cleanup.

competencies.statement: Choose stable input-order or labeled completion-order results and preserve per-item failures without corrupting visible state.
misconceptions: Promise.allSettled automatically provides correct domain recovery.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose stable input-order or labeled completion-order results and preserve per-item failures without corrupting visible state.

competencies.statement: Use deferred Promises to force saturation, reordered settlement, abort, duplicate, partial failure, queue drain, and zero-unhandled-rejection evidence.
misconceptions: Fast resolved promises exercise concurrency and backpressure adequately.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use deferred Promises to force saturation, reordered settlement, abort, duplicate, partial failure, queue drain, and zero-unhandled-rejection evidence.

competencies.statement: Keep browser work on pure string or byte models and isolate Node filesystem effects behind injected asynchronous ports.
misconceptions: Browser TypeScript execution proves Node filesystem atomicity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep browser work on pure string or byte models and isolate Node filesystem effects behind injected asynchronous ports.

competencies.statement: Define an explicit versioned JSON schema for metadata, records, provenance, and integrity with deterministic serialization.
misconceptions: A TypeScript interface is a persistent file schema.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define an explicit versioned JSON schema for metadata, records, provenance, and integrity with deterministic serialization.

competencies.statement: Bound bytes, parse into unknown, validate own keys and every member, reject duplicates and future versions, then commit state.
misconceptions: JSON.parse returning an object means the file is safe to trust.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bound bytes, parse into unknown, validate own keys and every member, reject duplicates and future versions, then commit state.

competencies.statement: Write a temporary file with intended mode, flush where required, replace under documented platform behavior, and clean failure residue.
misconceptions: fs.rename provides identical atomic replacement semantics on every supported OS.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write a temporary file with intended mode, flush where required, replace under documented platform behavior, and clean failure residue.

competencies.statement: Test current, prior, future, truncated, oversized, hostile-key, duplicate, interrupted, permission, backup, rollback, and restore cases.
misconceptions: One migration fixture proves every historical collection can be upgraded.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test current, prior, future, truncated, oversized, hostile-key, duplicate, interrupted, permission, backup, rollback, and restore cases.

competencies.statement: Revalidate scheme, hostname, port, path class, and redirect count for every destination and reject user-controlled egress.
misconceptions: A fixed first URL prevents SSRF through redirects or alternative schemes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Revalidate scheme, hostname, port, path class, and redirect count for every destination and reject user-controlled egress.

competencies.statement: Use own-property checks, explicit field construction, safe records, and no blind assignment from unknown objects.
misconceptions: JSON.parse cannot produce dangerous keys because JSON has no prototypes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use own-property checks, explicit field construction, safe records, and no blind assignment from unknown objects.

competencies.statement: Normalize or visibly escape control, ANSI, bidi, and non-printing sequences from commands, API payloads, and files.
misconceptions: A public curated API makes all response strings safe terminal text.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Normalize or visibly escape control, ANSI, bidi, and non-printing sequences from commands, API payloads, and files.

competencies.statement: Use an application-owned data location, reject traversal and unexpected file types, minimize permissions, and document symlink limits.
misconceptions: path.resolve plus startsWith is a complete containment check.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use an application-owned data location, reject traversal and unexpected file types, minimize permissions, and document symlink limits.

competencies.statement: Bound input, URL, response, nested arrays, cache, history, collection, queue, retries, output, file size, and diagnostic detail.
misconceptions: Node memory limits are an adequate application resource policy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bound input, URL, response, nested arrays, cache, history, collection, queue, retries, output, file size, and diagnostic detail.

competencies.statement: Separate pure validator and reducer, fetch, readline, cache, persistence, subprocess, compile-negative, fuzz-like, and controlled live smoke evidence.
misconceptions: One end-to-end suite gives the strongest and clearest diagnosis.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate pure validator and reducer, fetch, readline, cache, persistence, subprocess, compile-negative, fuzz-like, and controlled live smoke evidence.

competencies.statement: Use node:test hooks, deterministic fixtures, scoped mocks, injected ports, fake clocks or deferred promises, and independent state.
misconceptions: Tests run sequentially enough that global mocks cannot interfere.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use node:test hooks, deterministic fixtures, scoped mocks, injected ports, fake clocks or deferred promises, and independent state.

competencies.statement: Use original minimal unknown payloads that cover valid, changed, malformed, hostile, oversized, aborted, and reordered behavior.
misconceptions: A fully realistic copied API response is the best fixture for every unit.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use original minimal unknown payloads that cover valid, changed, malformed, hostile, oversized, aborted, and reordered behavior.

competencies.statement: Maintain expected-diagnostic fixtures for invalid command, unvalidated unknown, non-exhaustive variant, optional misuse, and unsafe mutation.
misconceptions: Runtime tests can prove every important TypeScript guarantee.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Maintain expected-diagnostic fixtures for invalid command, unvalidated unknown, non-exhaustive variant, optional misuse, and unsafe mutation.

competencies.statement: Test emitted command stdout, stderr, status, EOF, signal, working directory, listener and handle cleanup, and unhandled rejection policy.
misconceptions: Importing and calling main proves packaged Node CLI behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test emitted command stdout, stderr, status, EOF, signal, working directory, listener and handle cleanup, and unhandled rejection policy.

competencies.statement: Correlate command, operation generation, cache decision, request class, attempt, status class, duration, outcome, abort reason, and cleanup with bounded fields.
misconceptions: Verbose payload logging is required to diagnose asynchronous code.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Correlate command, operation generation, cache decision, request class, attempt, status class, duration, outcome, abort reason, and cleanup with bounded fields.

competencies.statement: Count commands, outcomes, cache decisions, requests, bytes, aborts, queue depth, validation and persistence failures without unbounded labels.
misconceptions: A finite API dataset makes resource names safe metric dimensions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Count commands, outcomes, cache decisions, requests, bytes, aborts, queue depth, validation and persistence failures without unbounded labels.

competencies.statement: Measure user-visible cold and warm percentiles plus event-loop delay under a declared scripted workload and environment.
misconceptions: Promise-based code cannot block the event loop.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure user-visible cold and warm percentiles plus event-loop delay under a declared scripted workload and environment.

competencies.statement: Compare request frequency, duplicate suppression, cache freshness, memory, and user latency across changed navigation patterns.
misconceptions: Maximizing hit rate always optimizes both user experience and fair use.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compare request frequency, duplicate suppression, cache freshness, memory, and user latency across changed navigation patterns.

competencies.statement: Gate bounded heap, listeners, handles, queue, requests, bytes, output, latency, and shutdown while preserving exact behavior.
misconceptions: One faster benchmark is enough to accept an optimization.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Gate bounded heap, listeners, handles, queue, requests, bytes, output, latency, and shutdown while preserving exact behavior.

competencies.statement: Define package type, source and output roots, explicit extensions, imports, exports, internal boundaries, and supported Node resolution.
misconceptions: TypeScript path aliases become Node runtime aliases automatically.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define package type, source and output roots, explicit extensions, imports, exports, internal boundaries, and supported Node resolution.

competencies.statement: Publish an executable JavaScript entry with portable launcher behavior, thin process wiring, correct permissions, and no source-tree assumptions.
misconceptions: A bin path may point directly to a ts file on every user machine.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Publish an executable JavaScript entry with portable launcher behavior, thin process wiring, correct permissions, and no source-tree assumptions.

competencies.statement: Use package files or ignore rules, inspect npm pack output, include license and docs, exclude secrets and residue, and verify dependency provenance.
misconceptions: npm publish includes only the files imported by the entrypoint.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use package files or ignore rules, inspect npm pack output, include license and docs, exclude secrets and residue, and verify dependency provenance.

competencies.statement: Install the packed artifact into clean temporary projects and test commands, data paths, signals, newlines, Node versions, and supported platforms.
misconceptions: Running npm start in the repository proves installed package behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Install the packed artifact into clean temporary projects and test commands, data paths, signals, newlines, Node versions, and supported platforms.

competencies.statement: Document configuration and data locations, schema compatibility, backup, upgrade, rollback, uninstall, support, and retained user data.
misconceptions: npm uninstall should remove every file the application created.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Document configuration and data locations, schema compatibility, backup, upgrade, rollback, uninstall, support, and retained user data.

competencies.statement: Bind source, lockfile, compiler, tests, emitted JavaScript, packed artifact, command behavior, saved data, checksums, and stakeholder review to one revision.
misconceptions: A green type check proves the packed runtime is the tested artifact.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bind source, lockfile, compiler, tests, emitted JavaScript, packed artifact, command behavior, saved data, checksums, and stakeholder review to one revision.

competencies.statement: Execute invalid input, not found, HTTP failure, malformed JSON, stale Promise, abort, cache corruption, write interruption, signal, and listener-leak cases.
misconceptions: Documented catch blocks make failure rehearsal optional.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Execute invalid input, not found, HTTP failure, malformed JSON, stale Promise, abort, cache corruption, write interruption, signal, and listener-leak cases.

competencies.statement: Prove schema migration, old-package compatibility limits, backup, rollback, restored data identity, and support decisions.
misconceptions: Rolling back npm package version always rolls back persisted schema.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prove schema migration, old-package compatibility limits, backup, rollback, restored data identity, and support decisions.

competencies.statement: Defend learning value, runtime validation, TypeScript claims, async ownership, API fair use, accessibility, security, tests, capacity, packaging, and non-claims.
misconceptions: A visually appealing live demo is stronger than traceable changed-case evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend learning value, runtime validation, TypeScript claims, async ownership, API fair use, accessibility, security, tests, capacity, packaging, and non-claims.

competencies.statement: Record remaining uncertainty, affected users, severity, mitigation, detection, accountable owner, expiry, escalation, and re-review trigger.
misconceptions: A preview application can carry unnamed permanent risks.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record remaining uncertainty, affected users, severity, mitigation, detection, accountable owner, expiry, escalation, and re-review trigger.
